name: Lewis Tatum
bio: Lewis Tatum serves as the Hopkins County Sheriff, overseeing law enforcement for Hopkins County from the county seat of Sulphur Springs. Sheriff Tatum brings years of service to the department and is focused on protecting the growing Hopkins County community.
campaignPromises: Ensure safe and secure county detention facilities
Increase use of social media for community alerts and crime tips
Recruit top-quality deputies to serve Hopkins County
